description_long: This object is a short, broad-bladed sword with a symmetrical, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade features a central ridge running along its length, giving it structural strength and a distinct visual profile. The hilt is equipped with a rounded guard that flares outward, providing protection for the hand, and a bulbous pommel at the end of the handle for balance. The handle appears to be ergonomically shaped for a secure grip, with a subtle contour that fits comfortably in the hand. The entire object is rendered in a uniform dark color, giving it a sleek and monolithic appearance. There are no visible decorative elements or engravings on the blade, guard, or handle.
description: A short, double-edged sword with a broad blade, rounded guard, and contoured handle, all in a uniform dark finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the broad, double-edged blade, rounded guard, and the contoured handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the guard and pommel visible as protrusions.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the symmetrical blade, guard, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the blade and handle.
